rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference visible ports.
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes based on whether they reference component ports or implementation details.
Only include visible identifiers in AGREE contracts; avoid referencing subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in type-level annexes.
Align AGREE expression types with AADL data types to prevent type mismatch errors.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid AADL data types and names.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid in that scope.
Avoid using subcomponent ports or opaque data types in component type contracts without explicit scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of component structure
